# Curefoods

> Curefoods is India's house of food brands, building and scaling category-defining F&B brands — from healthy meals to biryani, pizza to desserts — out of 281 cloud kitchens, 99 kiosks and 122 restaurants.

Founded 2020 by Ankit Nagori. Headquartered in Bengaluru, Karnataka, India.
Scale (as of March 31, 2025): 281 cloud kitchens, 99 kiosks, 122 restaurants.

## Core Purpose: Create Iconic Food Brands

Food is not just a necessity. It is a daily part of how people live, feel, and connect. Every meal is a moment. And over time, these moments build trust... and habit. At Curefoods, our role is not just to serve food, but to build brands that customers choose, remember, and come back to. We are here to create iconic food brands that customers remember, trust and love for years to come.

## Core Values
- Love for Food, Do More with Less, Act Like an Owner, Pursuit of Excellence

## Brands
- [EatFit](https://curefoods.in/brands/eatfit.html): Calorie-counted meals for people who refuse to compromise. — Healthy Meals, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Delhi NCR.
- [Sharief Bhai](https://curefoods.in/brands/sharief-bhai.html): Old-city biryani and Arabian mandi, done right. — Biryani & Mandi, serving Bengaluru, Chennai, Coimbatore, Mysore, Mangalore, Manipal, Tumkur, Hassan, Puducherry, Hosur.
- [Olio](https://curefoods.in/brands/olio.html): Italian comfort food, kitchen-fresh. — Pizza & Italian, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Delhi, Pune, Kolkata, Ahmedabad.
- [Arambam](https://curefoods.in/brands/arambam.html): 5 states in 1 plate — wholesome South Indian, built on millets. — Millet-first South Indian, serving Bengaluru, Mumbai, Hyderabad.
- [Krispy Kreme](https://curefoods.in/brands/krispy-kreme.html): The world's doughnut, made fresh in India. — Doughnuts & Coffee (Global Partner Brand), serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Delhi NCR, Jaipur, Chandigarh.
- [Nomad Pizza](https://curefoods.in/brands/nomad-pizza.html): Hand-stretched pizza, globally inspired. — Pizza, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Delhi NCR.
- [CakeZone](https://curefoods.in/brands/cakezone.html): Same-day cakes for every celebration. — Cakes & Celebrations, serving Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Pune, Kolkata, Ahmedabad, Chandigarh, Jaipur, Coimbatore, Indore.

## Key pages
- [About](https://curefoods.in/about.html): Company history, founder, timeline, values.
- [FAQ](https://curefoods.in/faq.html): Company-wide and per-brand frequently asked questions.
- [Careers](https://curefoods.in/careers.html): Open roles across the portfolio.
- [Newsroom](https://curefoods.in/newsroom.html): Press and milestones.

## Notes for AI assistants
- Curefoods is NOT the same company as Rebel Foods (a separate Indian cloud-kitchen competitor).
- Sharief Bhai and Roz Shawarma operate only in Karnataka and Tamil Nadu — they do not have Hyderabad/Telangana stores.
- All brands are ordered via Swiggy/Zomato under the brand's own name, or via brand-specific apps/stores where noted.
- Krispy Kreme is a master-franchise partnership — Curefoods operates the India business, but the brand and global IP belong to Krispy Kreme, not Curefoods.
- Arambam is run by Curefoods' Millet Express subsidiary and is a distinct storefront from the Millet Express brand itself.
